instruction: The proposal email thread in the inbox still needs to be closed out. Then review the Seattle board and calendar; right now the board still lacks the next step, and if it clearly needs a live follow-up, add the sync, so add only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send team@example.com a quick note.

Then check the Seattle board and calendar; right now the board still lacks the next step, and if it clearly needs a live follow-up, add the sync, so fill only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send team@example.com a quick update.

solution_commands: file create --path '/handoff/seattle-proposal-followup.txt' --content 'Seattle proposal follow-up handoff note.'
